source: docs/Contract_Review.docx (Health Partners — Client Contract Portfolio, 29 May 2026); contract-specific Q&A set (analysis-65, image-55).

fields.service_level_agreements: Health Partners standard occupational-health service levels apply: advice line Mon–Fri 09:00–17:30; questionnaire to certificate 1 working day; OHA referral to advice letter average 5 working days; specialist/physio/mental-health average 8 working days; complaints acknowledged within 48 hours and full response within 20 working days. In addition, a Royal Mail experience survey is circulated to the referring manager within 2 days of a case. Service credits are calculated per failing case as a percentage of the unit cost (e.g. 2% × number of cases × £46 for Average Clearance Time of 6–12 days against a 6-day SLA target).
fields.notable_clauses: Schedule 6 imposes Anti-Bribery & Corruption, Sanctions, Supply-Chain Transparency and Anti-Facilitation of Tax Evasion obligations. The Master Purchase Agreement carries no minimum spend commitment — Royal Mail may decrease demand to zero, subject only to an Annual Account Management Charge and clause 5.9 cancellation fees — and includes an option to extend the term by up to 2 years.

source: docs/Contract_Review.docx (Health Partners — Client Contract Portfolio, 29 May 2026); contract-specific Q&A set (tesco-simple-16/19, tesco-table-36, simple-20, analysis-63/65/67).

fields.service_level_agreements: Service-credit-backed SLAs: a 5% service credit applies where performance on any SLA line falls below 90% for 3 consecutive months; service credits are capped at 3 service lines per period and at 20% of total monthly fees in any period, with a monthly MI pack and spend report. Underlying Health Partners standard occupational-health service levels also apply.
fields.notable_clauses: Benchmarking obligation; service credits capped at 3 service lines per period (max 20% of monthly fees); affiliate/sub-contractor notification regime; Appendix E (controller-to-controller) clause (o) bars transfer of Contracted Personal Data outside the UK without prior written consent.

source: docs/Contract_Review.docx (Health Partners — Client Contract Portfolio, 29 May 2026); contract-specific Q&A set (boots-simple-01/03/05, analysis-64).

fields.notable_clauses: This is a 3-year extension Variation that replaces Schedule 7 (Charges & Payment) with Appendix A, using a fixed annual fee of £478,687.30 (paid 1/12th monthly in arrears) with a 5% volume tolerance (10% for physiotherapy). It carries PCI / cardholder-data security obligations, and Confidential Information must remain at the disclosed data centre(s) and not be moved to any other hosting.

source: docs/Contract_Review.docx (Health Partners — Client Contract Portfolio, 29 May 2026)

fields.notable_clauses: Amendment Agreement covering a subcontractor / data schedule; workplace adjustments are delivered via approved subcontractors.
